ogTitle: Gilgunnia vs Gilletts Ridge: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Gilgunnia and Gilletts Ridge.
heading: Gilgunnia vs Gilletts Ridge — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Gilgunnia, New South Wales and Gilletts Ridge, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Gilgunnia has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Gilletts Ridge (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Gilgunnia or Gilletts Ridge safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Gilgunnia has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Gilletts Ridge scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Gilgunnia scores 63/100 for bushfire risk. Gilletts Ridge scores 57/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Gilgunnia or Gilletts Ridge?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Gilgunnia has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
